title: Achievement Expansion — 15 New Engagement Achievements
summary: Add 15 new achievements focused on daily engagement, streaks, mastery milestones, and gameplay variety. These achievements incentivize returning daily, exploring all game modes, and mastering optimization. Requires tracking new stats (daily challenge streaks, modes explored, NAND-only solves) and wiring check logic into existing completion flows.

tasks.description: Add 'Week Warrior' achievement (silver): Complete 7 daily challenges in a row. Track consecutive daily challenge completions in stats. Must be 7 distinct calendar days of daily challenge completion.
acceptance_criteria: stats tracks dailyChallengeStreak (incremented on daily challenge completion, reset if a day is missed)
trackChallengeComplete checks for daily-specific streak separately from general challenge count

tasks.description: Add 'Month of Logic' achievement (gold): Complete 30 daily challenges total. Uses existing stats.challengesCompleted but specifically for daily challenges.
acceptance_criteria: stats tracks dailyChallengesTotal separately from random challenges

tasks.description: Add 'Streak Master' achievement (gold): Reach a 14-day play streak. Check streak data on updateStreak() call.
acceptance_criteria: Achievement check runs inside updateStreak() when streak >= 14

tasks.description: Add 'Minimalist' achievement (silver): Solve 10 levels at optimal gate count (exactly optimalGates). Track in stats.optimalSolves.
acceptance_criteria: stats.optimalSolves incremented when gateCount <= level.optimalGates on completion

tasks.description: Add 'Speed Circuit' achievement (silver): Complete any Chapter 4+ level in under 60 seconds. Chapter 4 = levels 21+ (chapter id 5+).
acceptance_criteria: Checked in checkAfterCompletion when levelId >= 21 and elapsed < 60
Achievement unlocks on first qualifying completion

tasks.description: Add 'Explorer' achievement (bronze): Try all 6 game modes (campaign, daily, random challenge, blitz, speedrun, sandbox). Track modes in stats.modesPlayed set.
acceptance_criteria: stats.modesPlayed is a persisted array/set tracking which modes have been entered
Each mode entry point (startLevel, startDailyChallenge, startChallenge, startBlitzMode, startSpeedrunMode, startSandbox) records the mode
Achievement unlocks when all 6 modes have been tried

tasks.description: Add 'Social Butterfly' achievement (bronze): Share a friend challenge link. Track when showChallengeFriendButton's share action is triggered.
acceptance_criteria: Achievement unlocks when the friend challenge URL is copied/shared

tasks.description: Add 'Creator' achievement (bronze): Create and play a custom level via the level creator. Track when a custom level URL is generated.
acceptance_criteria: Achievement unlocks when custom level creation flow completes (URL generated)

tasks.description: Add 'Universal Builder' achievement (silver): Solve any level using only NAND gates when other gates were available. Check gate types on completion.
acceptance_criteria: On level completion, check if all placed gates are NAND AND level.availableGates includes non-NAND types
Achievement unlocks on first qualifying solve

tasks.description: Add 'Perfectionist' achievement (gold): Achieve 100% aesthetics score on any level with 3+ gates. Check aesthetics score in completion flow.
acceptance_criteria: On completion, if gates.length >= 3 and aesthetics.score === 100, unlock achievement

testing_focus: Verify all 15 new achievements appear in the achievements modal with correct tier and description
Verify existing achievements still work after the additions
Verify daily challenge streak tracking distinguishes daily from random challenges
Verify mode tracking persists across sessions via localStorage
Verify NAND-only detection works correctly (all gates must be NAND, and other gates must be available)
rollback_criteria: If any existing achievement or completion flow is broken, revert
